name: Maisara Caverns
tagline: Vilebranch necromancy — simultaneous duo kill, phantom puzzles, and soul-bloated Rak'tul.

bosses.name: Muro'jin & Nekraxx
bosses.summary: Kill together; Carrion Swoop into Freezing Trap; dodge Fetid Quillstorm.

abilities.name: Simultaneous kill
abilities.note: Nekraxx Bestial Wrath / Muro'jin Revive Pet if one dies first.

abilities.name: Carrion Swoop
abilities.note: Kite into trap; avoid clipping party with eagle path.

tips: Tank stacks bosses; mitigate Flanking Spear.

bosses.name: Vordaza
bosses.summary: Unstable Phantoms collide to clear; control Lingering Dread stacks; break Deathshroud in Necrotic Convergence.

abilities.name: Final Pursuit / phantoms
abilities.note: Collide ghosts — max ~2 Lingering Dread; dodge Veiled pools.

abilities.name: Necrotic Convergence
abilities.note: Deathshroud shield + Coalesced Death orbs — burn shield fast.

tips: Heavy rot healing — pace CDs for Convergence.

bosses.name: Rak'tul, Vessel of Souls
bosses.summary: Group for Crush Souls + Soulbind Totem cleave; interrupt Malignant Soul during Soulrending Roar for Spectral Residue.

abilities.name: Crush Souls
abilities.note: Three targets stack near totem for cleave.

abilities.name: Soulrending Roar
abilities.note: Kick/CC Malignant Souls for Residue buff.

abilities.name: Spiritbreaker
abilities.note: Tank leap leaves Spectral Decay — move boss thoughtfully.

dangerousPacks.name: Hulking Juggernaut
dangerousPacks.why: Deafening Roar spell-locks the group mid-cast.
handling: Stop casts before Roar; stun Juggernaut if needed.

dangerousPacks.name: Multiple Bramblemaw Bears
handling: Split bears; kite or CC one.
